content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT]
( 
	[ProductID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[ProductGroupID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[ProductName] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[ShortDescription] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,	
	[MediumDescription] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LongDescription] [nvarchar](300)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_ProductID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_ProductGroupID] [nvarchar](5)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [DATETIME]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
